_meta.note: QC: orientation + procedure sets; bare-declarative / step openers (no Welcome), 0 questions, 0 punitive, long comma-split closer, varied signature, last sentence longest.

sentences.sentence: The main entrance is just ahead.
Maps are available at the front desk.
The rose garden is in full bloom this month.
Please stay on the marked paths at all times.
Our greenhouse holds plants from tropical regions around the world.
Guided tours leave from this spot every hour.
If you would like to learn more, check the schedule posted near the main gate.
First, boil a cup of water.
Add one spoonful of loose tea for each person.
Pour the hot water slowly over the leaves.
Let the tea steep for about four minutes.
Strain it carefully into a clean, warm cup.
Before you serve it, taste a little and add honey if you prefer.
